---
title: "Publications"
listing:
  - id: pub-list
    contents: publications
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
    type: custom
    template: _ejs/publication.ejs
    categories: true
    filter-ui: true
    fields: [title, authors, year, pub-journal, volume, pages, doi, pdf]
    field-display-names:
      title: "Title"
      authors: "Authors"
      year: "Year"
      pub-journal: "Journal"
---

Below is a list of my academic publications. Click 📄 for a copy — doing so constitutes you requesting a personal copy, and me fulfilling that request.

For the most current list, see my [Google Scholar profile](https://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?user=ddZUIYEAAAAJ&hl=en).

::: {#pub-list}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  var cat = params.get('category');
  if (!cat) return;

  var entries = document.querySelectorAll('.publication-entry');
  entries.forEach(function(el) {
    var cats = el.getAttribute('data-categories');
    if (!cats || cats.split(',').indexOf(cat) === -1) {
      el.style.display = 'none';
    }
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('h2').forEach(function(h2) {
    var next = h2.nextElementSibling;
    var hasVisible = false;
    while (next && next.tagName !== 'H2') {
      if (next.classList && next.classList.contains('publication-entry') && next.style.display !== 'none') {
        hasVisible = true;
        break;
      }
      next = next.nextElementSibling;
    }
    if (!hasVisible) {
      h2.style.display = 'none';
    }
  });
});
</script>
```
